attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
		TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
		TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE,
		TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE,
		TVOUTPUT.REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
		COALESCE (MAX(CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE AS DATE)- INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY 
		TVOUTPUT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01' ) END_TV_DATE,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
		TVOUTPUT.ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,
		TVOUTPUT.ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,
		TVOUTPUT.FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
		TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
		TVOUTPUT.CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
		TVOUTPUT.CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY,
		TVOUTPUT.RECLASS_ROLE,	
		TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,
		TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
		TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
		TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
		TVOUTPUT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
		TVOUTPUT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
		TVOUTPUT.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
		TVOUTPUT.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
		TVOUTPUT.SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
		TVOUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
		TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE, 
		TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE, 
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
						   ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC
						  ) AS RANK_INDEX, 
		(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NFDTV.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE,
		TVOUTPUT.RECLASS_DATE,			
		TVOUTPUT.DEPT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY, 
		TVOUTPUT.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,
		TVOUTPUT.PL_ROLLUP_NAME,
		TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME		
FROM	(SELECT	BATCH_ID,
				BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
				RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
				BK_COMPANY_CODE,
				START_TV_DATE,
				RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE,
				REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
				BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
				ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,
				ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,
				FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
				BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
				FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
				CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
				CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY,
				RECLASS_ROLE,
				CAST(RECLASS_DATE AS DATE) RECLASS_DATE,		
				FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,
				FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
				FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
				FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE,
				BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
				BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
				BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
				BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
				DEPT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY, 
				ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
				MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
				MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,	
				PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
				BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
				SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
				EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
				ACTION_CODE,
				EXCEPTION_TYPE , 
				PL_ROLLUP_NAME,
				SRC_RPRTD_BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME,
				ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE ,BK_COMPANY_CODE,
												BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,RECLASS_ROLE, 
												FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
												FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE,
												ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
												ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
												BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,												
												BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
												BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
												MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
												CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY,CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
												FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
												RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE,
												DEPT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY 
									ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC
								 ) AS ROW_NUM 
		FROM	(SELECT	SIDEPT.BATCH_ID,
						SIDEPT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
						SIDEPT.RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
						SIDEPT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
						SIDEPT.START_TV_DATE,
						STSDP.COUNTRY_CODE AS RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE,
						SIDEPT.REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
						SIDEPT.BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
						SIDEPT.ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,
						SIDEPT.ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,
						SIDEPT.FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
						SIDEPT.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
						SIDEPT.FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
						SIDEPT.CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
						SIDEPT.CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY,
						SIDEPT.RECLASS_ROLE,
						SIDEPT.RECLASS_DATE,		
						SIDEPT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,
						SIDEPT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
						SIDEPT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
						SIDEPT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE,
						SIDEPT.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
						SIDEPT.BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
						SIDEPT.BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
						SIDEPT.BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
						SIDEPT.DEPT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,		
						SIDEPT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
						SIDEPT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
						SIDEPT.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,	
						SIDEPT.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
						SIDEPT.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
						SIDEPT.SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
						SIDEPT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
						SIDEPT.ACTION_CODE, 
						SIDEPT.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
						SIDEPT.PL_ROLLUP_NAME,
						SIDEPT.SRC_RPRTD_BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME  	
				FROM	(SELECT	STSIDP.BATCH_ID, 
								CAST(SUBSTR(STSIDP.DEPT_NO,4) AS CHAR(9)) AS BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE, 
								SUBSTR(STSIDP.RECLASS_DEPT,4,10) AS RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
								STSIDP.COUNTRY_CODE AS BK_COMPANY_CODE,
								COALESCE(CAST(STSIDP.PUBLISHED_DATE AS DATE), CAST(STSIDP.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)) AS START_TV_DATE,
								CAST(STSIART.ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD_VALUE AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
								STSIDP.CURRENCY_CODE AS BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
								CAST(STSIDP.EST_BUDGET AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,
								CAST(STSIDP.EST_HEADCOUNT AS INTEGER)AS ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,
								STSIDP.USAGE_DESCRIPTION AS FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
								STSIDP.LOCATION_CODE AS BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
								COALESCE(NCWPF_CNT_PAR.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY, 
								COALESCE(NCWPF_MAN.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
								COALESCE(NCWPF_ANL.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
								(CASE WHEN STSIDP.RECLASS_DEPT IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS RECLASS_ROLE,
								CAST(STSIDP.RECLASS_DATE AS DATE) RECLASS_DATE ,	
								STSIDP.DEPT_NAME AS FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,
								STSIDP.ACTIVE_INDICATOR AS FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
								CAST (STSIDP.START_DATE AS DATE) AS FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
								CAST(STSIDP.END_DATE AS DATE) AS FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE, 
								COALESCE(NFML.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
								COALESCE(NFSR.BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
								COALESCE(NFTC.BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
								COALESCE(NFFU.BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
								COALESCE(NCWPF_DEPT.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DEPT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY, 
								COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
								COALESCE(SMWIMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,-999) AS MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
								COALESCE(SMWIMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') as MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,		
								COALESCE(SMPHN.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,-999) AS PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
								COALESCE(ELSBU.BUSINESS_UNIT_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
								CAST(SUBSTR(STSIDP.DEPT_NO,4) AS CHAR(9)) AS SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
								STSIDP.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
								STSIDP.ACTION_CODE, 
								'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
								STSIDP.PL_DESC	as PL_ROLLUP_NAME,
								COALESCE(STSIDP.BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE,'UNKNOWN') as SRC_RPRTD_BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME						
						FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_SI_DEPT_PUBLISHED STSIDP 
						INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_TV NFLTV 
							ON (STSIDP.LOCATION_CODE = NFLTV.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE 
								AND NFLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101) 
						INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFCTV 
							ON (STSIDP.COUNTRY_CODE = NFCTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
								AND NFCTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101 ) 
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICTV 
							ON ( STSIDP.CURRENCY_CODE = NICTV.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE 
								AND NICTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101 ) 
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SI_ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD STSIART 
							ON (STSIDP.ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD = STSIART.ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD_VALUE) 
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWPF_ANL 
							ON (STSIDP.FA_EMP_ID = NCWPF_ANL.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
								AND NCWPF_ANL.END_TV_DATE = 16000101) 
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWPF_CNT_PAR 
							ON (STSIDP.CONTROLLER_ID = NCWPF_CNT_PAR.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS 
								AND NCWPF_CNT_PAR.END_TV_DATE = 16000101) 
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWPF_MAN 
							ON (STSIDP.CFP_MANAGER_ID = NCWPF_MAN.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS 
								AND NCWPF_MAN.END_TV_DATE = 16000101) 
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWPF_DEPT 
							ON (STSIDP.MANAGER_EMP_ID = NCWPF_DEPT.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
								AND NCWPF_DEPT.END_TV_DATE = 16000101)
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB NFML
							ON STSIDP.MARKET_LOB_ID = NFML.SK_MARKET_LOB_ID_INT
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION NFSR
							ON STSIDP.REGION_ID = NFSR.SK_REGION_ID_INT
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY NFTC
							ON STSIDP.TAX_CATEGORY_CODE = NFTC.BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT NFFU
							ON STSIDP.FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID = NFFU.SK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID_INT
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_SI_BUSINESS_UNIT ELSBU
							ON STSIDP.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID= ELSBU.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
						LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
							ON STSIDP.LEGAL_CODE = NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN	(SELECT NMH.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY , 
					SUBSTR(WIDE.COMP_DEPT_VALUE,1,3) AS COMPANY_CODE,
					SUBSTR(WIDE.COMP_DEPT_VALUE,5,6) AS DEPARTMENT_CODE,
					NMH.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM AS MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME		
			FROM 	(SELECT EMP.NODE_VALUE AS PARENT_NODE_VALUE, 
							EMP.NODE_DESC AS PARENT_NODE_DESC,
							EMP.NODE_ID PARENT_NODE_ID,
							DEPT.NODE_VALUE AS COMP_DEPT_VALUE
					FROM	(SELECT  * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE NODE_TYPE='D')  DEPT, 
							(SELECT  * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE NODE_TYPE='E')  EMP
					WHERE 	DEPT.PARENT_NODE_ID = EMP.NODE_ID
					) WIDE
					/* ,$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE SMHN */
					,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE NMH
			WHERE	 NMH.NODE_ID_INT = WIDE.PARENT_NODE_ID
		 /* SMHN.NODE_VALUE_CD = WIDE.PARENT_NODE_VALUE
			AND  SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM = WIDE.PARENT_NODE_DESC  
			AND     NMH.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY= SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY */ /*Commented to not to use SM table here */
			) SMWIMHN
ON (STSIDP.COUNTRY_CODE = SMWIMHN.COMPANY_CODE 
AND SUBSTR(STSIDP.DEPT_NO,4,10) = SMWIMHN.DEPARTMENT_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN	(SELECT NPL.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY          , 
					SUBSTR(NPL.NODE_VALUE_CD ,1,3) AS COMPANY_CODE,
					SUBSTR(NPL.NODE_VALUE_CD ,5,6) AS DEPARTMENT_CODE
			FROM  	/* ( $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE SMPL , */
					$$FINLGLVWDB.N_PL_HIERARCHY_NODE NPL
					/*where SMPL.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY= NPL.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY */
			) SMPHN
ON (STSIDP.COUNTRY_CODE = SMPHN.COMPANY_CODE 
AND SUBSTR(STSIDP.DEPT_NO,4,10) = SMPHN.DEPARTMENT_CODE)
) SIDEPT 
LEFT OUTER JOIN	(SELECT CAST(STSDP.DEPT_NO AS CHAR(12))  DEPT_NO,  
			STSDP.COUNTRY_CODE 
	 FROM   $$STGDB.ST_SI_DEPT_PUBLISHED STSDP 
	 UNION ALL 
	SELECT  CAST(TRIM(NFDTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE)||TRIM(NFDTV.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE) AS CHAR(12)) DEPT_NO,
			NFDTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE  COUNTRY_CODE 
	FROM   	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_TV NFDTV  
	WHERE 	END_TV_DATE=16000101
	) STSDP
ON (SIDEPT.RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE = STSDP.DEPT_NO)						
					UNION ALL					
                    SELECT 	EXDEPT.BATCH_ID,
							EXDEPT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
							EXDEPT.RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
							EXDEPT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
							EXDEPT.START_TV_DATE,
							EXSDP.COUNTRY_CODE AS RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE,
							EXDEPT.REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
							EXDEPT.BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
							EXDEPT.ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,
							EXDEPT.ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,
							EXDEPT.FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
							EXDEPT.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
							EXDEPT.FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
							EXDEPT.CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
							EXDEPT.CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY,
							EXDEPT.RECLASS_ROLE,
							EXDEPT.RECLASS_DATE,		
							EXDEPT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,   
							EXDEPT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
							EXDEPT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
							EXDEPT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE,
							EXDEPT.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
							EXDEPT.BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
							EXDEPT.BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
							EXDEPT.BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
							EXDEPT.DEPT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY, 	
							EXDEPT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
							EXDEPT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
							EXDEPT.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,	
							EXDEPT.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
							EXDEPT.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
							EXDEPT.SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
							EXDEPT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
							EXDEPT.ACTION_CODE, 
							EXDEPT.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
							EXDEPT.PL_ROLLUP_NAME,
							EXDEPT.SRC_RPRTD_BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME
					FROM	(SELECT  DISTINCT EXSIDP.BATCH_ID, 
									CAST(SUBSTR(EXSIDP.DEPT_NO,4) AS CHAR(9)) AS BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE, 
									SUBSTR(EXSIDP.RECLASS_DEPT,4,10) AS  RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
									EXSIDP.COUNTRY_CODE AS BK_COMPANY_CODE,
									COALESCE( CAST(EXSIDP.PUBLISHED_DATE AS DATE), CAST(EXSIDP.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)) AS START_TV_DATE,
									CAST(STSIART.ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD_VALUE AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
									EXSIDP.CURRENCY_CODE AS BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
									CAST(EXSIDP.EST_BUDGET AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,    
									CAST(EXSIDP.EST_HEADCOUNT AS INTEGER)AS  ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,    
									EXSIDP.USAGE_DESCRIPTION AS FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
									EXSIDP.LOCATION_CODE AS BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
									COALESCE(NCWPF_ANL.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
									COALESCE(NCWPF_MAN.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS  CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
									COALESCE(NCWPF_CNT_PAR.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY, 
									(CASE WHEN  EXSIDP.RECLASS_DEPT IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE  'N' END)  AS RECLASS_ROLE,
									CAST(EXSIDP.RECLASS_DATE AS DATE) RECLASS_DATE ,		
									EXSIDP.DEPT_NAME AS FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,
									EXSIDP.ACTIVE_INDICATOR AS FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
									CAST  (EXSIDP.START_DATE AS DATE)  AS FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
									CAST(EXSIDP.END_DATE AS DATE) AS FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE, 
									COALESCE(NFML.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
									COALESCE(NFSR.BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
									COALESCE(NFTC.BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
									COALESCE(NFFU.BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
									COALESCE(NCWPF_DEPT.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)  AS DEPT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY, 
									COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
									COALESCE(SMWIMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,-999) AS MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
									COALESCE(SMWIMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') as MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME, 
									COALESCE(SMPHN.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,-999)AS PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
									COALESCE(ELSBU.BUSINESS_UNIT_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
									CAST(SUBSTR(EXSIDP.DEPT_NO,4) AS CHAR(9)) AS SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
									EXSIDP.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
									EXSIDP.ACTION_CODE, 
									'NE'  EXCEPTION_TYPE,
									EXSIDP.PL_DESC	as	PL_ROLLUP_NAME,
									COALESCE(EXSIDP.BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE,'UNKNOWN') as SRC_RPRTD_BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME
							FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_DEPT_PUBLISHED EXSIDP 
							INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_TV NFLTV 
								ON (EXSIDP.LOCATION_CODE =  NFLTV.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE 
									AND  NFLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101) 
							INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFCTV 
								ON (EXSIDP.COUNTRY_CODE = NFCTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
									AND  NFCTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101 ) 
							LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICTV 
								ON (EXSIDP.CURRENCY_CODE =  NICTV.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE 
									AND  NICTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101 ) 
							LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_SI_ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD STSIART 
								ON (EXSIDP.ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD =  STSIART.ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD_VALUE) 
							LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWPF_ANL 
								ON  (EXSIDP.FA_EMP_ID = NCWPF_ANL.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
									AND  NCWPF_ANL.END_TV_DATE = 16000101) 
							LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV  NCWPF_CNT_PAR
